role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified Cyrillic script and specific vocabulary ('МОБИЛЕЙ', 'ПИЦЦА') to narrow candidates.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and settlement patterns (Soviet outskirts) without drifting into unrelated domains.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified 'Betula pendula' (Silver Birch) and temperate grasses, consistent with the visible deciduous trees.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road infrastructure, specifically unpaved shoulders and Soviet-era utility poles, which are regulatory/infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (architecture + street furniture) to distinguish between similar post-Soviet states.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their domains, provided image-grounded evidence, and correctly identified the country as Russia. The tournament logic was sound, correctly prioritizing the linguistic evidence (Cyrillic) and architectural style to select Russia over Ukraine.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Soviet architecture and flat terrain match image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Road shoulders and poles match image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Fencing and street furniture match image.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The pipeline correctly predicted the ground truth (Russia).
